summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Enhanced Gift Flow feature. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing was limited due to Playwright browser session auth persistence issues - not related to the actual gift flow implementation.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend gift flow implementation is complete and well-structured
POST /api/gifts/send - Creates gift with pending status, sends notification to recipient
POST /api/gifts/{id}/accept - Changes status to pending_address, returns requires_address=true
POST /api/gifts/{id}/submit-address - Validates address, creates order, changes status to completed, sends notifications
GET /api/gifts/received - Properly hides product details for pending gifts (is_surprise=true)
GET /api/gifts/{id}/details - Properly hides product from recipient for pending gifts, shows to sender
Frontend GiftsPage.js has all required data-testids: received-gifts-tab, sent-gifts-tab, accept-gift-{id}, reject-gift-{id}, enter-address-{id}, confirm-address-btn
Address modal form includes city (select), area, street, building, floor, phone (required), notes fields

success_rate.frontend: Unable to verify via browser automation due to auth session issues (code review confirms correct implementation)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test gifts created during pytest execution for buyer (demo-buyer-001) with product 4908333c-23a3-4c3d-a063-ccdaca88cf03
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gift flow fully implemented and tested via backend APIs. All endpoints working: /api/gifts/send, /api/gifts/received, /api/gifts/sent, /api/gifts/{id}/accept, /api/gifts/{id}/submit-address, /api/gifts/{id}/details, /api/gifts/{id}/reject. Frontend has correct data-testids. Browser automation had session management issues but APIs confirmed working via curl/pytest.

POST /api/gifts/send.details: Creates gift with pending status. Supports anonymous gifts. Validates product exists. Sends notification to recipient.

GET /api/gifts/received.details: Returns list of gifts for recipient. Hides product details (name, image, price) for pending gifts. Shows requires_address=true for pending_address gifts.

GET /api/gifts/sent.details: Returns list of gifts sent by user with full product details.

POST /api/gifts/{id}/accept.details: Changes gift status from pending to pending_address. Returns requires_address=true. Prevents double acceptance. Validates recipient.

POST /api/gifts/{id}/submit-address.details: Validates required fields (city, area, phone). Creates order with recipient's address. Changes gift status to completed. Sends notifications to sender and recipient.

GET /api/gifts/{id}/details.details: Returns gift details. Hides product from recipient for pending gifts. Shows full details to sender. Validates user is sender or recipient.

POST /api/gifts/{id}/reject.details: Changes gift status to rejected. Sends notification to sender. Validates recipient and pending status.

Complete Flow Test.details: Full flow tested: send gift -> accept -> submit address -> order created with correct status transitions and data persistence.

api_tests_run.test: Get received gifts with hidden details
Send -> Accept -> Submit Address -> Order Created
